name: Chicken Au Poivre
recipeInstructions:
1. Pepper's piquant flavor helps disguise the lack of salt.
2. On wax paper, combine flour, pepper, and mustard. Lightly coat chicken with flour mixture, pressing to make pepper adhere.
3. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, heat oil. Add garlic; sauté 30 seconds.
4. Place chicken in skillet so that pieces do not touch. Cook about 4 minutes or until lightly browned, turning once.
5. Remove to serving platter; keep warm. Pour off fat.
6. Stir in sherry. Cook over high heat, stirring constantly for 2-3 minutes or until thickened and liquid is reduced by half.
7. Stir in parsley. Spoon sauce over chicken.
